name: RFISI: Internal Connection to Address Hosting Malware
notes: This rule will notify when an internal system communicates with an IP that is considered to be hosting malware. See https://ibm.biz/rfisi_threat_intel
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Malware IPs - IP, XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4 - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY RFISI: Internal Connection to Address Hosting Malware on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Malware IPs - IP, XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4 - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: RFISI: Internal Connection to Address Hosting Malware
Event description: An internal system is communicating with an IP that is considered to be hosting malware.
